min_spend_400.text: Minimum spend of ₹400 required per transaction

exclusions_general.text: Fuel, utilities, and EMI transactions excluded

swiggy_app_only.text: Applicable only on orders via Swiggy Mobile App

upi_device_binding.text: Requires Axis Kiwi UPI device registration

monthly_capping_5000.text: 5% cashback capped at ₹5,000 per billing cycle

cred_coins_only.text: Cashback awarded as CRED Coins (not direct cash)

zomato_pro_benefits.text: May require active Zomato Gold for dining rewards

exclusions_mcc.text: This merchant category (MCC) is excluded from rewards under the card's terms

partner_merchant.text: Higher rate applies only to designated Amazon Pay partner merchants

fuel_no_reward.text: Fuel earns no reward (surcharge waiver only)
